osm_tags.description: Mountain bike trail. 13 miles from Stillwell Woods to Bethpage State Park. Maintained by CLIMB.
osm_tags.name: Blue Trail

osm_tags.description: The Nassau-Suffolk trail is a hiking trail from Cold Spring Harbor to Merrick Rd at the southern end of Massapequa Preserve. It's 20 miles long.
osm_tags.name: Nassau/Suffolk Greenbelt Trail
